since_last: 29% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.36%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 29% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.48% · Gold -0.41% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 29% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.36%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.36%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.14%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -4.68%
cards.body: Leaders: NXPI +1.96%, DV +1.11%, NOW +0.88%, MSFT +0.76%, SOUN +0.72%. Laggards: KLAC -4.68%, ARM -4.57%, MU -4.40%, AMAT -3.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.74% at $156.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
